read_file.description: Read the content of a file.
read_file.range: Line range to read, e.g., '1-10' to read lines 1 to 10, if not specified, read the entire file. If a single number is given (e.g., '5'), it means from that line to the end of the file.

write_file.target: Target content for replacement, only used when type is 'replace'

ask_user.description: Ask the user a question and get the input.
ask_user.question: The question to ask the user
ask_user.options: Optional list of options for the user to choose from
ask_user.hasCustomization: Indicates whether the user can provide a custom answer

list_files.dir: Directory path to list files from
list_files.recursive: Whether subdirectories should be included in the listing

create_sub_agent.description: Create a new sub agent. The return value is the sub agent ID

sub_agent.description: Delegate tasks to other models. Note: This is asynchronous and does not wait for the task to complete
sub_agent.task: Describe this task with natural language
sub_agent.level: Model level. The lower the level, the more complex the tasks handled

wait_sub_agent.description: Wait for the sub agent to complete the current task.

add_todo.description: Add a TODO. The return value is the TODO ID.
add_todo.task: Describe this task with natural language

update_todo.description: Update the status of a TODO.

reasoning_effort.description: Change the reasoning effort of this session

update_plan.target: Target content for replacement, only used when type is 'replace'

hasTodoReminder: [System warning] You have unfinished TODOs, you can use the `list_todo` tool to view them
autoModeOn: This session has now switched to automatic mode, so you shouldn't ask the user questions
autoModeOff: This session has now switched off automatic mode, allowing you to ask users questions whenever needed
